programmes.show_description: Crime drama with Ryan Gosling. A stuntman moonlighting as a getaway driver tries to protect the wife and child of an imprisoned criminal, only to get drawn into a conflict with the Mafia.

When a woman dies after a year of nasty side effects to a drug, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.
